entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the primary crop studied for genetic diversity and nutritional quality

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value and security provided by pearl millet landraces

entities.name: HARSH ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The challenging environmental factors present in the semiarid regions of Rajasthan

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: The Indian state where the pearl millet landraces were sampled

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: AMPLIFIED FRAGMENT LENGTH POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: A molecular marker technique used to investigate genetic diversity patterns

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY PATTERNS
entities.description: The distribution and variation of genetic traits within and between pearl millet populations

entities.name: FARMERS' LOCAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: The traditional knowledge held by farmers regarding their local cultivars

entities.name: SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: The management practices and structures used by farmers for seed maintenance and exchange

entities.name: SHANNONS' INFORMATION INDEX
entities.description: A statistical measure used to quantify genetic diversity in landraces and cultivars

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF MOLECULAR VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the proportion of genetic variation within and between populations

entities.name: GENE FLOW
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material between populations, used as an indicator for seed exchange

entities.name: SEED EXCHANGE
entities.description: The practice of farmers trading seeds among themselves

entities.name: IN SITU MAINTENANCE
entities.description: The conservation of genetic resources in their natural habitats

entities.name: BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches used to improve traditional cultivars for better performance

entities.name: PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall growth and effectiveness of the crop

entities.name: YIELDING STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of crop yield across different environments and conditions
